description:
You are a Performance Engineer for a media streaming platform using two redundant CDN providers (metrics: servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_1 and servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_2). Create a dashboard named 'CDN Routing Divergence' containing three graphs:

- 'Absolute Speed Divergence': The absolute difference between speed_sensor_1 and speed_sensor_2 (absolute and diffSeries), aliased as 'Absolute Gap'.
- 'S1/S2 Performance Ratio': The ratio of speed_sensor_1 (dividend) to speed_sensor_2 (divisor) using divideSeries, aliased as 'S1 to S2 Ratio'.
- 'Smoothed Lower Bound Floor': A 10-point moving average of the minimum value across both sensors (movingAverage and minSeries), aliased as 'Smoothed Worst Speed'.

Save the dashboard. Dashboard name, graph titles, and alias strings must match exactly.
